verses.text: Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh Zion Mual tungah Tuuno a dingin a om ka mu hi. Amah tawh mi tul za leh tul sawmli leh tul li dingkhawm uh a, tua mite' taltangah Tuuno leh a pa' min kigelh hi
Tua laitakin tuizeu lianpi leh vanging tawh a kibang a gingpha mahmah aw khat vantung panin a hong ging ka za hi. Tua awging pen harp lasakna a kitum a ging tawh kibang hi
Tokhom, ganhing lite, leh upate' lam nga-in tua mihonpite in la thak khat a sa uh hi. Tua la pen leitungah a kitankhiasa mi tul za leh tul sawmli leh tul lite simloh kuamah dang in sa theilo uh hi

Hih mite in numei tawh paktatna gamta ngei nailo uh a, paubaan'na a neilote ahi uh hi. Amaute in Tuuno a paina peuhpeuhah zui uh a, midang khempeuh sung panin a kitankhiasa, Pasian leh Tuuno tungah a kipia masa mite ahi uh hi
Amaute, paubaan'na om kiuhkeuhlo uh ahih manin zuauthu gen ngei hetlo uh hi.
Tua ciangin leitungah a teng mi namkim, pau namkim a zang mite tungah a tawntungin Lungdamna ding Thu gen ding a nei vantung mi khat vankim lai-ah a leeng ka mu hi
Amah nakpi takin kiko a, “Amah in mihingte thu a khen ding hun hong tungta ahih manin Pasian kihta un la amah phat un. Van leh lei, tuinak leh tuipite a bawlpa hong bia ta un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi a nihna in hong zui a, “A Lian Babylon khuapi kicim, kicim! Amah a huk a lanna leenggahzu, mi khempeuh tungah pia-in khamsak a, gimna thuaksak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi a thumna in a masate gel hong zui leuleu-in nakpi takin, “Tua ganhing leh a lim bia-in a taltang ahih kei leh a khut tungah ciamtehna a ngah mi peuhmah in

Pasian' leenggahzu zong dawn ding uh hi. Pasian in ama hehna ahi leenggahzu khauh pen ama hehna hai sungah a dimtakin sung khinzo ta hi. Tua bang mite pen a siangtho vantung mite leh Tuuno mai-ah meikuang leh kat khu tawh gimna kipia ding hi
Amaute a kibawlsiatna mei, khu tawntung a, ganhing leh a lim bia-in, a min kigelhna a nei mi peuhmah in a sun a zanin tatsat loin gimna thuak paisuak uh hi,” a ci hi
Pasian' thupiakna zui-in Jesuh tungah a citak Pasian' mite-a' dingin thuakzawhna kisam hi

Tua ciangin vantung panin awging khat ka za a, “Tu-a kipanin Topa thu-ah a si mite mi hampha mahmah ahi hi, cihna gelh in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho in, “Hi takpi hi. Amaute' nasepna thaman in amaute zui ding ahih manin a nasep gimna panun tawlnga-in nuamsa-in om ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Leitung Mite Anlak bangin A Kilakna

verses.text: Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh meiipi a bang a kang biakbuak om a, tua meiipi tungah mihing tawh a kibang khat tu-in, kham lukhu khu-in, a khutah phiaukawi hiam khat a tawi ka mu hi
Biakinn sung panin vantung mi khat hong paikhia a, meiipi tungah a tu mipa nakpi takin samin, “Leitung mite lak dingin min mahmah a, a lak hun hong tungta ahih manin na phiaukawi tawh at in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin meii tungah a tupa in leitungah a phiaukawi hong van a, leitung mite a at hi
Tua ciangin vantung biakinn panin vantung mi adang khat hong paikhia leuleu a, amah in zong phiaukawi hiam khat mah a tawi hi

Tua ciangin biakna tau panin vantung mi adang khat hong paikhia leuleu hi. Tua vantung mi pen mei a ukpa hi a, phiaukawi hiam a tawipa kiangah nakpi takin, “Leitung mite leenggah bangin minta ahih manin leitung mite na phiaukawi tawh atin a lom lomin kaikhawm in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin vantung mi in zong leitungah a phiaukawi hong van a, leitung mite kaikhawmin Pasian' hehna lian leenggah cilna phualah a kaikhawm hi
Khuapi pualamah kicil a, a cilna panin sisan vive luangkhia-in, pi nga bang thukin, tai zanih ciang bangah tuikhang bangin a luang hi.
